title: Define Command Button Properties (Character Mode)
text: Define Command Button Properties (Character Mode) Define the properties of this command button widget when it appears in character mode. For more information, see CommandButton . Properties Decoration How to Defining Command Buttons Related Links Widgets and Character Mode If you create components that are intended for use in a character mode environment, be economical with the amount of text you display in each label and widget.
